description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a cylindrical shape and a rounded handle attached to one side. The cup features a playful decorative pattern, including a large black cat face and some stylized text, possibly reading 'Kuliöe.' The surface is punctuated by several irregular holes, giving it a unique, almost perforated appearance. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the body, while the rim and base are slightly rounded. The cup sits on a light wooden surface, and its interior appears hollow, with visible air gaps due to the holes. The overall finish is glossy, reflecting light and highlighting the smoothness of the ceramic material.
description: A white ceramic cup with a black cat motif, stylized text, and several decorative holes, featuring a glossy finish and a rounded handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black cat face, part of the handle, and prominent holes in the cup's body.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle fully visible and more of the decorative holes apparent, as well as a glimpse of the interior.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the handle's attachment and the largest holes, with less visible decoration.
description_view_3: Back view showing the text 'Kuliöe' and a mostly uninterrupted white surface with some holes.
